summary: Comprehensive CMS testing completed. All backend APIs (20/20 tests passed) and frontend admin panel functionality working correctly. Admin login, News/Events/Committee/Groups CRUD operations, and bilingual support (EN/PL) all verified.
passed_tests: Admin login with credentials admin/#ZwiazekPolski1 - SUCCESS
Admin Dashboard displays correct stats (News: 5, Events: 8, Committee: 10, Groups: 6)
News Management - List all news articles with bilingual titles
News Management - Create new article with EN/PL fields
News Management - Edit/Delete buttons functional
Events Management - List events with images, categories, dates
Events Management - Create new event with all fields
Events Management - Edit/Delete buttons functional
Committee Management - List members with photos, positions, bios
Committee Management - Add Member button and form working
Groups Management - List groups with bilingual names and schedules
Groups Management - Add Group button and form working
Public News page displays articles from database
Bilingual support - Language switcher toggles EN/PL content
News articles show correct language based on selection
Date formatting changes based on language (en-AU vs pl-PL)
Backend API /api/news - GET, POST, PUT, DELETE all working
Backend API /api/events - GET, POST, PUT, DELETE all working
Backend API /api/committee - GET, POST, PUT, DELETE all working
Backend API /api/groups - GET, POST, PUT, DELETE all working
Backend API /api/news/published - Returns only published articles
Backend API /api/auth/login - Returns JWT token
Backend API /api/auth/register - Creates admin user
seed_data_creation: Test data (TEST UI News Article, TEST UI Event) was created and cleaned up after testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: CMS fully functional. Admin panel at /admin/login with credentials admin/#ZwiazekPolski1. All CRUD operations for News, Events, Committee, Groups working. Bilingual support (EN/PL) verified on public News page. Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_cms_api.py cover all API endpoints.

features_verified.news_management: Full CRUD with bilingual fields (title_en/pl, summary_en/pl, content_en/pl)
features_verified.events_management: Full CRUD with categories, dates, times, locations
features_verified.committee_management: Full CRUD with photos, positions, bios, ordering
features_verified.groups_management: Full CRUD with bilingual fields and contact info
features_verified.public_news_display: Fetches from /api/news/published, displays based on language
features_verified.language_switching: Flag toggle in navbar switches all content between EN/PL
